title: Weekly Market Report | May 11–15, 2026
report:
## Japan Equity Markets — Weekly Overview

The Nikkei 225 moved **+1,326 pts (+3.5%)** this week (37,521 → 38,847).

The average return across all 67 themes was **+2.8%**.

---

## 📅 Key Events & News This Week

- US April CPI: Core 2.8% (below forecast 2.9%) → rate cut hopes rekindled
- Japan Q1 GDP: +0.7% QoQ (+2.8% annualized), beat expectations
- Murata Manufacturing: FY2026 revenue +16.1% → stock surges
- Tesla: Full-scale FSD China rollout boosts semiconductor stocks

---

  → AI and semiconductor capital inflows remain strong.
